title: Spicy Moroccan Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry with succulent shrimp, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Moroccan spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and chopped lemongrass and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Moroccan chili flakes, cumin, and coriander and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately and garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro.
